scope: Static source-contract confirmation of 202607180046_mvp_atomic_transaction_creation_phase2a.sql. The migration was not applied by this review.

createsOrDefines.index: transactions_mvp_creation_idempotency_uidx on (organisation_id, creation_idempotency_key) where creation_idempotency_key is not null
createsOrDefines.atomicRpcPrivilege: revoke public; grant execute to authenticated

atomicRpcEffects: creates or returns an idempotent transaction
links the originating lead as converted
links an accepted offer as converted when supplied
seeds participants, required documents, and workflow lanes
reconciliationRequirement: The new append-only reconciliation migration must add mandate_packet_id and explicitly revoke public execution from all three security-definer helpers before it grants the authenticated caller access to the atomic RPC.
